overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked Los Santos street in GTA V, featuring wet pavement reflections, neon-lit skyscrapers, and passing vehicles. The camera moves steadily along the sidewalk past parked cars, through an intersection, and alongside a commercial building as lightning flashes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with parked vehicles and distant illuminated skyline

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk approaching a parked white sedan and intersection

entered.detail: parked white four-door sedan with visible rear lights
tall palm trees lining the street against the night sky
illuminated modern glass towers with purple and blue neon lighting
tall street lamp casting light on the wet pavement
rain-soaked concrete reflecting street lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked city sidewalk at night, with a white sedan parked on the right and illuminated glass skyscrapers visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past palm trees and street lights, with wet pavement creating reflective surfaces throughout the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from right to left
crossing the intersection and entering tree-lined sidewalk section

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the wet intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection with visible crosswalk markings and traffic signals. A black sedan passes through the intersection as the camera crosses the street, leaving the parked white car behind and approaching a section with a yellow fire hydrant and tree-lined sidewalk ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk adjacent to commercial building with illuminated signage

events.description: dense tree canopy significantly darkens the sidewalk as camera passes under cover

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk shaded by dense trees next to a lit burger restaurant with stone walls

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated circular logo and warm interior lighting
low stone wall with metal railing separating sidewalk from building
thick canopy of trees creating shade over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a more enclosed section of sidewalk lined with dense trees on the right and a stone-walled commercial building on the left featuring a lit circular sign. The tree canopy creates darker lighting conditions as the walk continues past the restaurant facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined approach to intersection with electrical infrastructure

events.description: lightning flash illuminates the sky and reflects off the wet street surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the next intersection as lightning flashes in the distance

notable_agents.action: red pickup truck waiting at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large grey electrical utility box with warning labels
black metal fence running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the tree-lined sidewalk approaching the next intersection, with utility boxes visible on the right and a metal fence on the left. A dramatic lightning flash illuminates the rainy sky around the 48-second mark, briefly lighting up the wet pavement and distant glass towers as a red pickup truck waits at the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city street that shifts from an open urban vista to a more enclosed, tree-lined corridor. It begins on a wet sidewalk past a parked white sedan, moving toward illuminated glass skyscrapers that reflect off the shimmering pavement. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, a black sedan passes by and the view opens up before narrowing as the path leads toward a yellow fire hydrant and a stone-walled commercial building. The scene then shifts into a more shadowed environment where a dense tree canopy and a lit circular restaurant sign frame the walk. Finally, the camera approaches another intersection past utility boxes and a metal fence, just as a dramatic flash of lightning illuminates the rainy sky and a waiting red pickup truck.
